prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TAILORSSCISSORS-10IN Product Type: SCISSORS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Stainless Steel Fabric Shears 10 in Description: Cut through thick fabric and delicate cloth with the Universal Tool Tailor's Scissors.

These scissors have an overall length of 10", and the blades are about 5" in length. Each blade is 7/32" (5.5mm) thick. They are constructed of durable stainless steel, so you can count on them to keep the material you're working with in tact.

With a super sharp cutting edge, these scissors are ideal for cutting materials like chiffon, silk and other fabric. This is a must-have tool for all tailors, seamstresses and fabric crafters. Search Terms: crafting sewing cutting fabric tailors seamstress shears tools stainless steel arts and crafts dress making art projects hobby heavy duty sewing supplies fabric cutting sharp scissors Features: - Universal Tool Tailor's Scissors - 10" Overall Length - Blade Length: 5" | Blade Thickness: 7/32" (5.5mm) - Material: Stainless Steel - Sharp Cutting Edges - Cuts Through Thick & Delicate Materials === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 10in Tailor's Scissors Stainless Steel

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5In Blade, Sharp Cutting Edges, Heavy Duty, Cuts Thick And Delicate Fabrics

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blades, Sharp Cutting Edge, 5-Inch Blade Length, Cuts Thick And Delicate Fabrics
